name: avril.ca
message: Avril Supermarché Santé, an independent health food supermarket chain based in Quebec, Canada. Founded in 1995, Avril aims to promote a healthy lifestyle by making natural and organic products accessible to everyone. The company operates multiple stores across Quebec and offers a wide range of products, including groceries, supplements, beauty items, and ready-to-eat meals.SITE: www.avril.caADDRESS:11 rue ÉvangélineGranby, Quebec, J2G 6N3Canada.TEL#: 1-844-375-6446ALL DATA SIZE: ≈550gb+1.
